name: Airplane
hint: A fixed-wing aircraft that is propelled forward by thrust from jet engines or propellers.

name: Helicopter
hint: A rotorcraft that is capable of vertical takeoff and landing, and hover in place.

name: Glider
hint: A fixed-wing aircraft that is designed to fly without an engine and relies on wind currents for lift.

name: Blimp
hint: A lighter-than-air aircraft that has a non-rigid structure and can be propelled and steered.

name: Hot Air Balloon
hint: A lighter-than-air aircraft that uses heated air to generate lift and is propelled by wind.

name: Gliders
hint: A fixed-wing aircraft similar to a glider but designed to carry passengers.

name: Jet Fighter
hint: A high-speed military aircraft designed for air-to-air combat and ground-attack missions.

name: Cargo Plane
hint: An aircraft designed to transport goods and freight over long distances.

name: Seaplane
hint: An aircraft that can take off and land on both land and water.

name: Drone
hint: An unmanned aircraft operated remotely or autonomously.
